sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46318" key="zugi=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῠγῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, fem. of <sense id="n46318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζύγιος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg009.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:p.144B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.144B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
